# Tripletex API v2 Documentation

**Version:** 2.74.00
**Base URL:** `https://kkpqfuj-amager.tripletex.dev/v2`
**Spec URL:** `https://kkpqfuj-amager.tripletex.dev/v2/openapi.json`
**Swagger UI:** `https://kkpqfuj-amager.tripletex.dev/v2-docs/#/`

## Overview

    [ Base URL: https://kkpqfuj-amager.tripletex.dev/v2 ]

## Usage

-   **Download the spec** [openapi.json](/v2/openapi.json) file, it is a [OpenAPI Specification](https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification).

-   **Generating a client** can easily be done using tools like [openapi-generator](https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator) or [swagger-codegen](https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-codegen) or other that accepts [OpenAPI Specification](https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification) specs.

    -   For swagger codegen it is recommended to use the flag: **--removeOperationIdPrefix**.
        Unique operation ids are about to be introduced to the spec, and this ensures forward compatibility - and results in less verbose generated code.

-   **Please note** that Tripletex offers several packages. Some endpoints are only supported in certain packages. You can see the Tripletex packages [here](https://www.tripletex.no/priser/).

## Overview

-   Partial resource updating is done using the `PUT` method with optional fields instead of the `PATCH` method.

-   **Actions** or **commands** are represented in our RESTful path with a prefixed `:`. Example: `/hours/123/:approve`.

-   **Summaries** or **aggregated** results are represented in our RESTful path with a prefixed `>`. Example: `/hours/>thisWeeksBillables`.

-   **Request ID** is a key found in all responses in the header with the name `x-tlx-request-id`. For validation and error responses it is also in the response body. If additional log information is absolutely necessary, our support division can locate the key value.

-   **version** This is a revision number found on all persisted resources. If included, it will prevent your PUT/POST from overriding any updates to the resource since your GET.

-   **Date** follows the **[ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)** standard, meaning the format `YYYY-MM-DD`.

-   **DateTime** follows the **[ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)** standard, meaning the format `YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss`.

-   **Searching** is done by entering values in the optional fields for each API call. The values fall into the following categories: range, in, exact and like.

-   **Missing fields** or even **no response data** can occur because result objects and fields are filtered on authorization.

-   **See [GitHub](https://github.com/Tripletex/tripletex-api2) for more documentation, code examples, changelog and more.**

-   **See [Tripletex for developers](https://developer.tripletex.no/) for more practical information, support, updates and access form**

## Authentication

[Read more here](https://developer.tripletex.no/docs/documentation/authentication-and-tokens/)

-   **Tokens:** The Tripletex API uses 3 different tokens

    -   **consumerToken** is a token provided to the consumer by Tripletex after the API 2.0 registration is completed.

    -   **employeeToken** is a token created by an administrator in your Tripletex account via the user settings and the tab "API access". Each employee token must be given a set of entitlements.

    -   **sessionToken** is the token from `/token/session/:create` which requires a consumerToken and an employeeToken created with the same consumer token, but not an authentication header.

-   **Authentication** is done via [Basic access authentication](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Basic_access_authentication)

    -   **username** is used to specify what company to access.

        -   `0` or blank means the company of the employee.

        -   Any other value means accountant clients. Use `/company/>withLoginAccess` to get a list of those.

    -   **password** is the **sessionToken**.

    -   If you need to create the header yourself use `Authorization: Basic <encoded token>` where `encoded token` is the string `<target company id or 0>:<your session token>` Base64 encoded.

## Tags

-   `[BETA]` This is a beta endpoint and can be subject to change.
-   `[DEPRECATED]` Deprecated means that we intend to remove/change this feature or capability in a future "major" API release. We therefore discourage all use of this feature/capability.

## Fields

Use the `fields` parameter to specify which fields should be returned. This also supports fields from sub elements, done via `<field>(<subResourceFields>)`. `*` means all fields for that resource. Example values:

-   `project,activity,hours` returns `{project:..., activity:...., hours:...}`.
-   just `project` returns `"project" : { "id": 12345, "url": "tripletex.no/v2/projects/12345" }`.
-   `project(*)` returns `"project" : { "id": 12345 "name":"ProjectName" "number.....startDate": "2013-01-07" }`.
-   `project(name)` returns `"project" : { "name":"ProjectName" }`.
-   All resources and some subResources : `*,activity(name),employee(*)`.

## Sorting

Use the `sorting` parameter to specify sorting. It takes a comma separated list, where a `-` prefix denotes descending. You can sort by sub object with the following format: `<field>.<subObjectField>`. Example values:

-   `date`
-   `project.name`
-   `project.name, -date`

## Changes

To get the changes for a resource, `changes` have to be explicitly specified as part of the `fields` parameter, e.g. `*,changes`.
There are currently two types of change available:

-   `CREATE` for when the resource was created
-   `UPDATE` for when the resource was updated

**NOTE**

> For objects created prior to October 24th 2018 the list may be incomplete, but will always contain the CREATE and the last change (if the object has been changed after creation).

## Rate limiting

Rate limiting is performed on the API calls for an employee for each API consumer. Status regarding the rate limit is returned as headers:

-   `X-Rate-Limit-Limit` - The number of allowed requests in the current period.
-   `X-Rate-Limit-Remaining` - The number of remaining requests.
-   `X-Rate-Limit-Reset` - The number of seconds left in the current period.

Once the rate limit is hit, all requests will return HTTP status code `429` for the remainder of the current period.

## Response envelope

#### Multiple values

```json
{
  "fullResultSize": ###, // {number} [DEPRECATED]
  "from": ###, // {number} Paging starting from
  "count": ###, // {number} Paging count
  "versionDigest": "###", // {string} Hash of full result, null if no result
  "values": [...{...object...},{...object...},{...object...}...]
}
```

#### Single value

```json
{
  "value": {...single object...}
}
```

## WebHook envelope

```json
{
  "subscriptionId": ###, // Subscription id
  "event": "object.verb", // As listed from /v2/event/
  "id": ###, // Id of object this event is for
  "value": {... single object, null if object.deleted ...}
}
```

## Error/warning envelope

```json
{
  "status": ###, // {number} HTTP status code
  "code": #####, // {number} internal status code of event
  "message": "###", // {string} Basic feedback message in your language
  "link": "###", // {string} Link to doc
  "developerMessage": "###", // {string} More technical message
  "validationMessages": [ // {array} List of validation messages, can be null
    {
      "field": "###", // {string} Name of field
      "message": "###" // {string} Validation message for field
    }
  ],
  "requestId": "###" // {string} Same as x-tlx-request-id
}
```

## Status codes / Error codes

-   **200 OK**
-   **201 Created** - From POSTs that create something new.
-   **204 No Content** - When there is no answer, ex: "/:anAction" or DELETE.
-   **400 Bad request** -
    -   **4000** Bad Request Exception
    -   **11000** Illegal Filter Exception
    -   **12000** Path Param Exception
    -   **24000** Cryptography Exception
-   **401 Unauthorized** - When authentication is required and has failed or has not yet been provided
    -   **3000** Authentication Exception
-   **403 Forbidden** - When AuthorisationManager says no.
    -   **9000** Security Exception
-   **404 Not Found** - For resources that does not exist.
    -   **6000** Not Found Exception
-   **409 Conflict** - Such as an edit conflict between multiple simultaneous updates
    -   **7000** Object Exists Exception
    -   **8000** Revision Exception
    -   **10000** Locked Exception
    -   **14000** Duplicate entry
-   **422 Bad Request** - For Required fields or things like malformed payload.
    -   **15000** Value Validation Exception
    -   **16000** Mapping Exception
    -   **17000** Sorting Exception
    -   **18000** Validation Exception
    -   **21000** Param Exception
    -   **22000** Invalid JSON Exception
    -   **23000** Result Set Too Large Exception
-   **429 Too Many Requests** - Request rate limit hit
-   **500 Internal Error** - Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable
    -   **1000** Exception


## Authentication

**tokenAuthScheme**
- Type: `http`
- Scheme: `basic`
- Description: Basic AUTH where username is company/customer id for proxy use (or 0 for default), password should be set to the session token

### balanceSheet (1 endpoints)

#### `GET /balanceSheet`

**Summary:** Get balance sheet (saldobalanse).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `dateFrom` | query | string | ✓ | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (from and incl.). |
| `dateTo` | query | string | ✓ | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (to and excl.). |
| `accountNumberFrom` | query | integer |  | From and including |
| `accountNumberTo` | query | integer |  | To and excluding |
| `customerId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `employeeId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `departmentId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `projectId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `includeSubProjects` | query | boolean |  | Should sub projects of the given project be included (default: False) |
| `includeActiveAccountsWithoutMovements` | query | boolean |  | Should active accounts with no movements be included (default: False) |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

#### `GET /currency/{fromCurrencyID}/exchangeRate`

**Summary:** Returns the amount in the company currency, where the input amount is in fromCurrency, using the newest exchange rate available for the given date

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fromCurrencyID` | path | integer | ✓ | From Currency ID |
| `amount` | query | number | ✓ | Amount to be exchanged |
| `date` | query | string | ✓ | Voucher date |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperNumber`

---

#### `GET /currency/{fromCurrencyID}/{toCurrencyID}/exchangeRate`

**Summary:** Returns the amount in the specified currency, where the input amount is in fromCurrency, using the newest exchange rate available for the given date

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fromCurrencyID` | path | integer | ✓ | From Currency ID |
| `toCurrencyID` | path | integer | ✓ | To Currency ID |

| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

| `paidAmount` | query | number |  | Paid amount to register prepayment of the invoice, in invoice currency. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but b |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Invoice`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

#### `PUT /invoice/{id}/:createCreditNote`

**Summary:** Creates a new Invoice representing a credit memo that nullifies the given invoice. Updates this invoice and any pre-existing inverse invoice.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Invoice id |
| `date` | query | string | ✓ | Credit note date |
| `comment` | query | string |  | Comment |
| `creditNoteEmail` | query | string |  | The credit note will not be sent if the customer send type is email and this field is empty |
| `sendToCustomer` | query | boolean |  | Equals (default: True) |
| `sendType` | query | string enum: ['EMAIL', 'EHF', 'EFAKTURA', 'AVTALEGIRO', 'VIPPS', 'PAPER', 'MANUAL', 'DIRECT', 'AUTOINVOICE_EHF_OUTBOUND', 'AUTOINVOICE_EHF_INCOMING', 'PEPPOL_EHF_INCOMING'] |  | Equals |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

---

#### `PUT /invoice/{id}/:createReminder`

**Summary:** Create invoice reminder and sends it by the given dispatch type. Supports the reminder types SOFT_REMINDER, REMINDER and NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION. DispatchType NETS_PRINT must have type NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION. SMS and NETS_PRINT must be activated prior to usage in the API.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `type` | query | string enum: ['SOFT_REMINDER', 'REMINDER', 'NOTICE_OF_DEBT_COLLECTION', 'DEBT_COLLECTION'] | ✓ | type |
| `date` | query | string | ✓ | yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today. |
| `includeCharge` | query | boolean |  | Equals (default: False) |
| `includeInterest` | query | boolean |  | Equals (default: False) |
| `dispatchType` | query | string enum: ['NETS_PRINT', 'EMAIL', 'OWN_PRINTER', 'SFTP', 'API', 'SMS'] |  | dispatchType |
| `dispatchTypes` | query | string |  | List of dispatch types (comma separated enum values) |
| `smsNumber` | query | string |  | SMS number (must be a valid Norwegian telephone number) |
| `email` | query | string |  | Email address to send the reminder to. (Defaults to to the same email list as the invoice if not provided) |
| `address` | query | string |  | Address to send the reminder to. (Defaults to the customer address if not provided) |
| `postalCode` | query | string |  | Postal code to send the reminder to (Defaults to the customer postal code if not provided) |
| `city` | query | string |  | City to send the reminder to (Defaults to the customer city if not provided) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInteger`

---

#### `PUT /invoice/{id}/:payment`

**Summary:** Update invoice. The invoice is updated with payment information. The amount is in the invoice’s currency.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Invoice id |
| `paymentDate` | query | string | ✓ | Payment date |
| `paymentTypeId` | query | integer | ✓ | PaymentType id |
| `paidAmount` | query | number | ✓ | Amount paid by the customer in the currency determined by the account of the paymentType |
| `paidAmountCurrency` | query | number |  | Amount paid by customer in the invoice currency. Optional, but required for invoices in alternate currencies. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

---

#### `PUT /invoice/{id}/:send`

**Summary:** Send invoice by ID and sendType. Optionally override email recipient.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `sendType` | query | string enum: ['EMAIL', 'EHF', 'AVTALEGIRO', 'EFAKTURA', 'VIPPS', 'PAPER', 'MANUAL'] | ✓ | SendType |
| `overrideEmailAddress` | query | string |  | Will override email address if sendType = EMAIL |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation

---

**Summary:** Get invoice document by invoice ID.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `invoiceId` | path | integer | ✓ | Invoice ID from which PDF is downloaded. |
| `download` | query | boolean |  | Equals (default: True) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: PDF document → `string`

| `supplierId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `customerId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `employeeId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `departmentId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `projectId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `productId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `accountingDimensionValue1Id` | query | integer |  | Id of the first free accounting dimension. |
| `accountingDimensionValue2Id` | query | integer |  | Id of the second free accounting dimension. |
| `accountingDimensionValue3Id` | query | integer |  | Id of the third free accounting dimension. |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseLedgerAccount`

#### `GET /ledger/account`

**Summary:** Find accounts corresponding with sent data.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |

| `isInactive` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `isApplicableForSupplierInvoice` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `ledgerType` | query | string enum: ['GENERAL', 'CUSTOMER', 'VENDOR', 'EMPLOYEE', 'ASSET'] |  | Ledger type |
| `isBalanceAccount` | query | boolean |  | Balance account |
| `saftCode` | query | string |  | SAF-T code |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseAccount`

|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|

| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseAccountingDimensionName`

#### `GET /ledger/accountingDimensionName/search`

|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|

| `activeOnly` | query | boolean |  | Whether to only return active dimensions (optional) |
| `onlyDimensionsWithActiveValues` | query | boolean |  | Whether to only return active dimensions with active values which are shown in voucher registration (optional) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields to include in response. |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseAccountingDimensionName`

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |

| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

#### `GET /ledger/posting`

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |

| `openPostings` | query | string |  | Deprecated |
| `accountId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `supplierId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `customerId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `employeeId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `departmentId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `projectId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `productId` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `accountNumberFrom` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `accountNumberTo` | query | integer |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `type` | query | string enum: ['INCOMING_PAYMENT', 'INCOMING_PAYMENT_OPPOSITE', 'INCOMING_INVOICE_CUSTOMER_POSTING', 'INVOICE_EXPENSE', 'OUTGOING_INVOICE_CUSTOMER_POSTING', 'WAGE'] |  | Element ID for filtering |
| `accountingDimensionValue1Id` | query | integer |  | Id of first free accounting dimension. |
| `accountingDimensionValue2Id` | query | integer |  | Id of second free accounting dimension. |
| `accountingDimensionValue3Id` | query | integer |  | Id of third free accounting dimension. |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponsePosting`

#### `GET /ledger/postingByDate`

**Summary:** Get postings by date range with pagination. Returns the same PostingDTO as /ledger/posting. Simplified endpoint for better performance. Fields and Changes are not supported. Token must have access to all vouchers in the company, otherwise a validation error is returned. If access control for salary information is activated, the token must have access to salary information as well.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `dateFrom` | query | string | ✓ | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (from and incl.). |
| `dateTo` | query | string | ✓ | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (to and excl.). |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponsePosting`

---

**Summary:** Get posting rules for current company.  The posting rules defined which accounts from the chart of accounts that are used for postings when the system creates postings.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperPostingRules`

| `vatDate` | query | string |  | yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today. Note that this is only used in combination with typeOfVat-parameter. Only valid vatTypes  |

| `name` | query | string | ✓ | VAT type name, max 8 characters. |
| `vatTypeId` | query | integer | ✓ | VAT type ID. The relative VAT type will behave like this VAT type, except for the basis for calculating the VAT deductio |
| `percentage` | query | number | ✓ | Basis percentage. This percentage will be multiplied with the transaction amount to find the amount that will be the bas |

#### `POST /ledger/voucher`

**Summary:** Add new voucher. IMPORTANT: Also creates postings. Only the gross amounts will be used. Amounts should be rounded to 2 decimals.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `sendToLedger` | query | boolean |  | Should the voucher be sent to ledger? Requires the "Advanced Voucher" permission. (default: True) |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Voucher`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/>externalVoucherNumber`

**Summary:** Find vouchers based on the external voucher number.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `externalVoucherNumber` | query | string |  | The external voucher number, when voucher is created from import. |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseVoucher`

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/>nonPosted`

**Summary:** Find non-posted vouchers.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `dateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `dateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `includeNonApproved` | query | boolean | ✓ | Include non-approved vouchers in the result. (default: False) |
| `changedSince` | query | string |  | Only return elements that have changed since this date and time |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseVoucher`

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/>voucherReception`

**Summary:** Find vouchers in voucher reception.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `dateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `dateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `searchText` | query | string |  | Search |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseVoucher`

---

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/historical/:closePostings`

**Summary:** [BETA] Close postings.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `postingIds` | query | string |  | [Deprecated] List of Posting IDs to close separated by comma. The postings should have the same customer, supplier or em |

**Request Body:** `application/json`

**Responses:**

- `200`: Postings closed successfully

---

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/historical/:reverseHistoricalVouchers`

**Summary:** [BETA] Deletes all historical vouchers. Requires the "All vouchers" and "Advanced Voucher" permissions.

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/historical/employee`

**Summary:** [BETA] Create one employee, based on import from external system. Validation is less strict, ie. employee department isn't required.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Employee`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperEmployee`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/historical/historical`

**Summary:** API endpoint for creating historical vouchers. These are vouchers created outside Tripletex, and should be from closed accounting years. The intended usage is to get access to historical transcations in Tripletex. Also creates postings. All amount fields in postings will be used. VAT postings must be included, these are not generated automatically like they are for normal vouchers in Tripletex. Requires the \"All vouchers\" and \"Advanced Voucher\" permissions.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `comment` | query | string |  | Import comment, include the name and version of the source system. |
| `useCustomNumberSeries` | query | boolean |  | Use custom number series (true), or use default number series for historical vouchers (false). |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → Array of `HistoricalVoucher`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ListResponseHistoricalVoucher`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/historical/{voucherId}/attachment`

**Summary:** Upload attachment to voucher. If the voucher already has an attachment the content will be appended to the existing attachment as new PDF page(s). Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. Non PDF formats will be converted to PDF. Send as multipart form.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `voucherId` | path | integer | ✓ | Voucher ID to upload attachment to. |

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperHistoricalVoucher`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/importDocument`

**Summary:** Upload a document to create one or more vouchers. Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. EHF/XML is possible with agreement with Tripletex. Send as multipart form.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `split` | query | boolean |  | If the document consists of several pages, should the document be split into one voucher per page? (default: False) |

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ListResponseVoucher`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/importGbat10`

**Summary:** Import GBAT10. Send as multipart form.

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `200`: List of imported voucher IDs → `array`

---

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/list`

**Summary:** Update multiple vouchers. Postings with guiRow==0 will be deleted and regenerated.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `sendToLedger` | query | boolean |  | Should the voucher be sent to ledger? Requires the "Advanced Voucher" permission. (default: True) |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → Array of `Voucher`

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseVoucher`

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/openingBalance`

**Summary:** [BETA] Get the voucher for the opening balance.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/openingBalance`

**Summary:** [BETA] Add an opening balance on the given date.  All movements before this date will be 'zeroed out' in a separate correction voucher. The opening balance must have the first day of a month as the date, and it's also recommended to have the first day of the year as the date. If the postings provided don't balance the voucher, the difference will automatically be posted to a help account

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: *) |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `OpeningBalance`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `DELETE /ledger/voucher/openingBalance`

**Summary:** [BETA] Delete the opening balance. The correction voucher will also be deleted

**Responses:**

- `204`: successful operation

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/openingBalance/>correctionVoucher`

**Summary:** [BETA] Get the correction voucher for the opening balance.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Voucher`

**Responses:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/{id}/:reverse`

**Summary:** Reverses the voucher, and returns the reversed voucher. Supports reversing most voucher types, except salary transactions.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of voucher that should be reversed. |
| `date` | query | string | ✓ | Reverse voucher date |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/{id}/:sendToInbox`

**Summary:** Send voucher to inbox.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of voucher that should be sent to inbox. |
| `version` | query | integer |  | Version of voucher that should be sent to inbox. |
| `comment` | query | string |  | Description of why the voucher was rejected. This parameter is only used if the approval feature is enabled. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `PUT /ledger/voucher/{id}/:sendToLedger`

**Summary:** Send voucher to ledger.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of voucher that should be sent to ledger. |
| `version` | query | integer |  | Version of voucher that should be sent to ledger. |
| `number` | query | integer |  | Voucher number to use. If omitted or 0 the system will assign the number. (default: 0) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/{id}/options`

**Summary:** Returns a data structure containing meta information about operations that are available for this voucher. Currently only implemented for DELETE: It is possible to check if the voucher is deletable.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperVoucherOptions`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/{voucherId}/attachment`

**Summary:** Upload attachment to voucher. If the voucher already has an attachment the content will be appended to the existing attachment as new PDF page(s). Valid document formats are PDF, PNG, JPEG and TIFF. Non PDF formats will be converted to PDF. Send as multipart form.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `voucherId` | path | integer | ✓ | Voucher ID to upload attachment to. |

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperVoucher`

---

#### `DELETE /ledger/voucher/{voucherId}/attachment`

**Summary:** Delete attachment.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `voucherId` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of voucher containing the attachment to delete. |
| `version` | query | integer |  | Version of voucher containing the attachment to delete. |
| `sendToInbox` | query | boolean |  | Should the attachment be sent to inbox rather than deleted? (default: False) |
| `split` | query | boolean |  | If sendToInbox is true, should the attachment be split into one voucher per page? (default: False) |

**Responses:**

- `204`: successful operation

---

#### `GET /ledger/voucher/{voucherId}/pdf`

**Summary:** Get PDF representation of voucher by ID.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `voucherId` | path | integer | ✓ | Voucher ID from which PDF is downloaded. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: PDF representation of the voucher → `string`

---

#### `POST /ledger/voucher/{voucherId}/pdf/{fileName}`

**Summary:** [DEPRECATED] Use POST ledger/voucher/{voucherId}/attachment instead.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `voucherId` | path | integer | ✓ | Voucher ID to upload PDF to. |
| `fileName` | path | string | ✓ | File name to store the pdf under. Will not be the same as the filename on the file returned. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: PDF uploaded successfully

### order (29 endpoints)

#### `GET /order`

**Summary:** Find orders corresponding with sent data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `number` | query | string |  | Equals |
| `customerId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `orderDateFrom` | query | string | ✓ | From and including |
| `orderDateTo` | query | string | ✓ | To and excluding |
| `deliveryComment` | query | string |  | Containing |
| `isClosed` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `isSubscription` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseOrder`

---

#### `POST /order`

**Summary:** Create order.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `Order`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperOrder`

---

#### `PUT /order/:invoiceMultipleOrders`

**Summary:** [BETA] Charges a single customer invoice from multiple orders. The orders must be to the same customer, currency, due date, receiver email, attn. and smsNotificationNumber

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | query | string | ✓ | List of Order IDs - to the same customer, separated by comma. |
| `invoiceDate` | query | string | ✓ | The invoice date |
| `sendToCustomer` | query | boolean |  | Send invoice to customer (default: True) |
| `createBackorders` | query | boolean |  | Create a backorder for all any orders that delivers less than ordered amount (default: False) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

---

#### `POST /order/list`

**Summary:** [BETA] Create multiple Orders with OrderLines. Max 100 at a time.

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ListResponseOrder`

#### `GET /order/{id}`

|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|

---

#### `PUT /order/{id}/:approveSubscriptionInvoice`

**Summary:** To create a subscription invoice, first create a order with the subscription enabled, then approve it with this method. This approves the order for subscription invoicing.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of order to approve for subscription invoicing. |
| `invoiceDate` | query | string | ✓ | The approval date for the subscription. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

---

#### `PUT /order/{id}/:attach`

**Summary:** Attach document to specified order ID.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperDocumentArchive`

---

#### `PUT /order/{id}/:invoice`

**Summary:** Create new invoice or subscription invoice from order.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of order to invoice. |
| `invoiceDate` | query | string | ✓ | The invoice date |
| `sendToCustomer` | query | boolean |  | Send invoice to customer (default: True) |
| `sendType` | query | string enum: ['EMAIL', 'EHF', 'AVTALEGIRO', 'EFAKTURA', 'VIPPS', 'PAPER', 'MANUAL'] |  | Send type used for sending the invoice |
| `paymentTypeId` | query | integer |  | Payment type to register prepayment of the invoice. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but both must be provided |
| `paidAmount` | query | number |  | Paid amount to register prepayment of the invoice, in invoice currency. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but b |
| `paidAmountAccountCurrency` | query | number |  | Amount paid in payment type currency |
| `paymentTypeIdRestAmount` | query | integer |  | Payment type of rest amount. It is possible to have two prepaid payments when invoicing. If paymentTypeIdRestAmount > 0, |
| `paidAmountAccountCurrencyRest` | query | number |  | Amount rest in payment type currency |
| `createOnAccount` | query | string enum: ['NONE', 'WITH_VAT', 'WITHOUT_VAT'] |  | Create on account(a konto) |
| `amountOnAccount` | query | number |  | Amount on account (default: 0) |
| `onAccountComment` | query | string |  | On account comment (default: ) |
| `createBackorder` | query | boolean |  | Create a backorder for this order, available only for pilot users (default: False) |
| `invoiceIdIfIsCreditNote` | query | integer |  | Id of the invoice a credit note refers to (default: 0) |
| `overrideEmailAddress` | query | string |  | Will override email address if sendType = EMAIL |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperInvoice`

---

#### `PUT /order/{id}/:unApproveSubscriptionInvoice`

**Summary:** Unapproves the order for subscription invoicing.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of order to unapprove for subscription invoicing. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: Order unapproved for subscription invoicing successfully

### project (75 endpoints)

#### `GET /project`

**Summary:** Find projects corresponding with sent data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `name` | query | string |  | Containing |
| `number` | query | string |  | Equals |
| `isOffer` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `projectManagerId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `customerAccountManagerId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `employeeInProjectId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `departmentId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `startDateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `startDateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `endDateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `endDateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `isClosed` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `isFixedPrice` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `customerId` | query | string |  | Equals |
| `externalAccountsNumber` | query | string |  | Containing |
| `includeRecentlyClosed` | query | boolean |  | If isClosed is false, include projects that have been closed within the last 3 months. Equals (default: False) |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseProject`

---

#### `PUT /project/dynamicControlForm/{id}/:copyFieldValuesFromLastEditedForm`

**Summary:** Into each section in the specified form that only has empty or default values, and copyFieldValuesByDefault set as true in the form's template, copy field values from the equivalent section in the most recently edited control form. Signed or completed forms will not be affected.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | The ID of the form that the values will be copied to |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation

---

### purchaseOrder (51 endpoints)

#### `GET /purchaseOrder`

**Summary:** Find purchase orders with send data. Only available for Logistics Basic.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `number` | query | string |  | Equals |
| `deliveryDateFrom` | query | string |  | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (from and incl.). |
| `deliveryDateTo` | query | string |  | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (to and incl.). |
| `creationDateFrom` | query | string |  | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (from and incl.). |
| `creationDateTo` | query | string |  | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (to and incl.). |
| `id` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `supplierId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `projectId` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `isClosed` | query | boolean |  | Equals |
| `withDeviationOnly` | query | boolean |  | Equals (default: False) |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponsePurchaseOrder`

---

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperPurchaseOrder`

#### `PUT /purchaseOrder/goodsReceipt/{id}/:registerGoodsReceipt`

**Summary:** Register goods receipt. Quantity received on the products is set to the same as quantity ordered. To update the quantity received, use PUT /purchaseOrder/goodsReceiptLine/{id}. Only available for Logistics Basic.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Purchase Order ID. |
| `registrationDate` | query | string | ✓ | yyyy-MM-dd. Defaults to today. |
| `inventoryId` | query | integer |  | ID of inventory. Main inventory is set as default |
| `comment` | query | string |  | Containing |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: *) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperGoodsReceipt`

### resultbudget (6 endpoints)

#### `GET /resultbudget`

**Summary:** Find result budgets corresponding with sent data. Either specify the ids of the departments, projects, products or employees to return result budgets for, or use the boolean parameters includeAll***ResultBudgets to get all results budgets.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `departmentIds` | query | string |  | List of department ids to return result budgets for |
| `projectIds` | query | string |  | List of project ids to return result budgets for |
| `productIds` | query | string |  | List of product ids to return result budgets for |
| `employeeIds` | query | string |  | List of employee ids to return result budgets for |
| `year` | query | integer |  | Must be between 1900-2100. Defaults to current year. |
| `includeAllDepartmentResultBudgets` | query | boolean |  | Include all department result budgets for active departments |
| `includeAllProjectResultBudgets` | query | boolean |  | Include all project result budgets for active projects |
| `includeAllProductResultBudgets` | query | boolean |  | Include all product result budgets for active products |
| `includeAllEmployeeResultBudgets` | query | boolean |  | Include all employee result budgets for active employees |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseResultBudget`

---

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |

| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

#### `POST /supplierInvoice/{invoiceId}/:addPayment`

**Summary:** Register payment, paymentType == 0 finds the last paymentType for this vendor.Use of this method requires setup done by Tripletex.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `invoiceId` | path | integer | ✓ | Invoice ID. |
| `paymentType` | query | integer | ✓ |  |
| `amount` | query | number |  |  |
| `kidOrReceiverReference` | query | string |  |  |
| `bban` | query | string |  |  |
| `paymentDate` | query | string |  |  |
| `useDefaultPaymentType` | query | boolean |  | Set paymentType to last type for vendor, autopay, nets or first available other type (default: False) |
| `partialPayment` | query | boolean |  | Set to true to allow multiple payments registered. (default: False) |

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperSupplierInvoice`

### timesheet (55 endpoints)

#### `GET /timesheet/allocated`

**Summary:** Find allocated hour entries corresponding with sent data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `ids` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `employeeIds` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `projectIds` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `activityIds` | query | string |  | List of IDs |
| `dateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `dateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 1000) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `POST /timesheet/allocated`

**Summary:** Add new allocated hour entry. Only one entry per employee/date/activity/project combination is supported. Only holiday/vacation hours can receive comments. A notification will be sent to the entry's employee if the entry has a comment.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `TimesheetAllocated`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ResponseWrapperTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/:approveList`

**Summary:** Only for allocated hours on the company's internal holiday/vacation activity. Mark the allocated hour entry/entries as approved. The hours will be copied to the time sheet if the relevant weeks/months are not approved, and there are no interfering time clocks that are active. Notifications will be sent to the entries' employees if the entries' approval statuses or comments have changed. If IDs are provided, the other args are ignored.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `ids` | query | string |  | List of allocated hour entry IDs. |
| `employeeIds` | query | string |  | List of IDs. Defaults to ID of token owner. |
| `dateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `dateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `managerComment` | query | string |  | Comment to be added to all approved hour entries. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/:unapproveList`

**Summary:** Only for allocated hours on the company's internal holiday/vacation activity. Mark the allocated hour entry/entries as unapproved. Notifications will be sent to the entries' employees if the entries' approval statuses or comments have changed. If IDs are provided, the other args are ignored.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `ids` | query | string |  | List of allocated hour entry IDs. |
| `employeeIds` | query | string |  | List of IDs. Defaults to ID of token owner. |
| `dateFrom` | query | string |  | From and including |
| `dateTo` | query | string |  | To and excluding |
| `managerComment` | query | string |  | Comment to be added to all unapproved hour entries. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `POST /timesheet/allocated/list`

**Summary:** Add new allocated hour entry. Multiple objects for several users can be sent in the same request. Only holiday/vacation hours can receive comments. Notifications will be sent to the entries' employees if the entries have comments.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → Array of `TimesheetAllocated`

**Responses:**

- `201`: successfully created → `ListResponseTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/list`

**Summary:** Update allocated hour entry. Multiple objects for different users can be sent in the same request. Note: Allocated hour entry object fields which are present but not set, or set to 0, will be nulled. Only holiday/vacation hours can receive comments. Notifications will be sent to the entries' employees if the entries' comments have changed.

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → Array of `TimesheetAllocated`

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `GET /timesheet/allocated/{id}`

**Summary:** Find allocated hour entry by ID.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/{id}`

**Summary:** Update allocated hour entry by ID. Note: Allocated hour entry object fields which are present but not set, or set to 0, will be nulled. Only holiday/vacation hours can receive comments. A notification will be sent to the entry's employee if the entry's comment has changed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |

**Request Body:** `application/json; charset=utf-8` → `TimesheetAllocated`

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `DELETE /timesheet/allocated/{id}`

**Summary:** Delete allocated hour entry by ID.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |

**Responses:**

- `204`: successful operation

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/{id}/:approve`

**Summary:** Only for allocated hours on the company's internal holiday/vacation activity. Mark the allocated hour entry as approved. The hours will be copied to the time sheet if the relevant week/month is not approved, and there are no interfering time clocks that are active. A notification will be sent to the entry's employee if the entry's approval status or comment has changed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `managerComment` | query | string |  | Comment to be added to the approved hour entry. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `PUT /timesheet/allocated/{id}/:unapprove`

**Summary:** Only for allocated hours on the company's internal holiday/vacation activity. Mark the allocated hour entry as unapproved. A notification will be sent to the entry's employee if the entry's approval status or comment has changed.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | path | integer | ✓ | Element ID |
| `managerComment` | query | string |  | Comment to be added to the unapproved hour entry. |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperTimesheetAllocated`

---

#### `GET /timesheet/entry/>totalHours`

**Summary:** Find total hours registered on an employee in a specific period.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `employeeId` | query | integer |  | ID of employee to find hours for. Defaults to ID of token owner. |

| `endDate` | query | string |  | Format is yyyy-MM-dd (to and excl.). Defaults to tomorrow. |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ResponseWrapperBigDecimal`

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |

| `count` | query | integer |  | Number of elements to return (default: 3) |
| `fields` | query | string |  | Fields filter pattern (default: id, nameKey, code, isPickUp) |
| `from` | query | integer |  | From index (default: 0) |
| `sorting` | query | string |  | Sorting pattern (default: ) |

**Responses:**

- `200`: successful operation → `ListResponseTransportType`

#### `POST /travelExpense/{travelExpenseId}/attachment`

|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|

| `createNewCost` | query | boolean |  | Create new cost row when you add the attachment (default: False) |

**Request Body:** `multipart/form-data`

**Responses:**

- `200`: Returns the updated travel expense with the new attachment.

---

#### `DELETE /travelExpense/{travelExpenseId}/attachment`

**Summary:** Delete attachment.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
|------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| `travelExpenseId` | path | integer | ✓ | ID of attachment containing the attachment to delete. |
| `version` | query | integer |  | Version of voucher containing the attachment to delete. |
| `sendToInbox` | query | boolean |  | Should the attachment be sent to inbox rather than deleted? (default: False) |
| `split` | query | boolean |  | If sendToInbox is true, should the attachment be split into one voucher per page? (default: False) |

**Responses:**

- `204`: successful operation

---

#### `POST /travelExpense/{travelExpenseId}/attachment/list`

**Responses:**

- `200`: Returns the updated travel expense with the new attachments.

|----------|------|----------|-------------|

| `pending` | boolean |  | Whether or not this term is pending reconciliation (read-only) |
| `reconciliation` | Reconciliation |  |  |
| `reconciliationGroup` | string enum: ['VAT', 'SALARY', 'BALANCE', 'ANNUAL'] |  | The reconciliation type predicted on this term (read-only) |
| `startDate` | string |  | The terms available for the given year (read-only) |
| `termNumber` | integer |  | The term number for this period (read-only) |

### `AmeldingPeriodStatus`

A-melding summary status per month for the requested year. Only populated when canAccessSalary is true.

|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `month` | integer |  | 1-indexed month (1 = January, 12 = December) (read-only) |
| `status` | string enum: ['completed', 'notCompleted', 'awaitingResponse'] |  |  (read-only) |
| `year` | integer |  |  (read-only) |

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `ameldingSum` | number |  | Amelding sum of the payment (read-only) |

| `ledgerSum` | number |  | Ledger sum of the payment (read-only) |
| `paidAmount` | number |  | Paid amount of the payment (read-only) |
| `paymentDate` | string |  | Payment date (read-only) |
| `restAmount` | number |  | Rest amount of the payment (read-only) |
| `startDate` | string |  | Start date of the payment period (read-only) |
| `uri` | string |  | URI of the payment resource (read-only) |

### `BalanceReconciliationOverviewLine`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `accountId` | integer |  | The ID of the relevant account |
| `attachedVouchers` | Array<BalanceReconciliationVoucher> |  | List of vouchers attached to the line |
| `availableStatuses` | Array<string> |  | The set of statuses the line can transition to from its current status (read-only) |
| `balanceChange` | number |  | The sum of movements on the account for the period |
| `balanceIn` | number |  | The ingoing balance of the account for the period |
| `balanceOut` | number |  | The outgoing balance of the account for the period |
| `controlledAt` | string |  | The date and time the line was controlled |
| `controlledBy` | Employee |  |  |
| `difference` | number |  | The difference between the outgoing balance and the documented balance |
| `displayName` | string |  | The human-readable name of the account |
| `documentedBalance` | number |  | The documented balance of the account for the period |
| `errors` | Array<string> |  |  |
| `reconciledAt` | string |  | The date and time the line was marked as reconciled |
| `reconciledBy` | Employee |  |  |
| `status` | string enum: ['NOT_RECONCILED', 'RECONCILED', 'REJECTED', 'CONTROLLED', 'IGNORED'] |  | The reconciliation status of the line |
| `storedBalanceChange` | number |  | The stored balance change from when the entry was last saved (read-only) |
| `storedBalanceIn` | number |  | The stored ingoing balance from when the entry was last saved (read-only) |
| `storedBalanceOut` | number |  | The stored outgoing balance from when the entry was last saved (read-only) |

| `deviationExpenses` | number |  | The deviation of expenses from the budget (read-only) |
| `deviationIncome` | number |  | The deviation of income from the budget (read-only) |
| `deviationNetAmount` | number |  | The deviation of net amount from the budget (read-only) |
| `displayName` | string |  | The display name of the budget item (read-only) |
| `totalExpenses` | number |  | The total expenses amount (read-only) |
| `totalIncome` | number |  | The total income amount (read-only) |
| `totalNetAmount` | number |  | The total net amount (total income - total expenses) (read-only) |

| `sumTotalExpenses` | number |  | Total expenses amount (read-only) |
| `sumTotalIncome` | number |  | Total income amount (read-only) |
| `sumTotalNetAmount` | number |  | Total net amount (total income - total expenses) (read-only) |

### `ChatCompanyDTO`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `access` | boolean |  | If the current login employee has access to the company or not (read-only) |
| `customerId` | integer |  | Customer id of the company the chat is started with if applicable (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  | Id of the company the chat is started with (read-only) |
| `latestMessageTimestamp` | string |  | Latest message timestamp (read-only) |
| `latestThread` | ChatThread |  |  |
| `name` | string |  | Name of the company the chat is started with (read-only) |
| `proxyEmployeeId` | integer |  | Proxy employee id of the company the chat is started with if applicable (read-only) |
| `type` | string enum: ['OWN', 'CLIENT', 'ACCOUNTANT'] |  | Type of the company the chat is started with (read-only) |
| `unhandledAOThreads` | boolean |  | Has unhandled threads from this company (read-only) |
| `unreadMessages` | boolean |  | Has unread messages from this company (read-only) |

| `numberOfRegisteredPatents` | integer |  | The number of patents registered by the company |

| `reportsOnlyProvisionIncome` | string |  | Whether or not the company only reports provision income |
| `subGroupId` | integer |  | Sub group ID |
| `summary` | ControlledTransactionsSummary |  |  |
| `yearEndReport` | YearEndReport |  |  |

### `ControlledTransactionsSummary`

Summary of something

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `sumFinancialIncome` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category financial income |
| `sumOperationalIncome` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category operational income |
| `totalClaims` | number |  | The sum of all outstanding with the category claim |
| `totalDebt` | number |  | The sum of all outstanding with the category debt |
| `totalExtraordinaryPurchases` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category extraordinary purchase |
| `totalExtraordinarySales` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category extraordinary sale |
| `totalFinancialCost` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category financial cost |
| `totalGuaranteeBasis` | number |  | The sum of all outstanding with the category guarantee basis |
| `totalGuarantorResponsibility` | number |  | The sum of all outstanding with the category guarantor responsibility |
| `totalOperationalCost` | number |  | The sum of all transactions with the category operational cost |

| `receiverEmployeeId` | integer |  | Employee Id of the receiver of the document. |
| `receiverName` | string |  | Document receiver. (read-only) |
| `senderName` | string |  | Document sender. (read-only) |
| `size` | integer |  | Document size. (read-only) |

### `DocumentReceptionPageContext`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `authAllEmployees` | boolean |  | Can see all receivers (read-only) |
| `authVoucherReception` | boolean |  | Auth Voucher Reception (read-only) |
| `documentReceptionEmail` | string |  | document reception email (read-only) |
| `maxFileSize` | integer |  | Max file size allowed (read-only) |

|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `documentId` | integer |  |  |
| `isValid` | boolean |  |  |
| `messageId` | integer |  |  |
| `validationMessages` | Array<string> |  |  |

The list of postings of the voucher. In postings, these fields must be provided: date, account, currency, amount, amountBasis, amountVat, amountCurrency, amountBasisCurrency.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `account` | Account |  |  |
| `amount` | number |  | The posting amount in company currency. Important: The amounts in this amount field must have sum =  |
| `amountCurrency` | number |  | The posting amount in posting currency. |
| `amountGross` | number |  | The posting gross amount in company currency. |
| `amountGrossCurrency` | number |  | The posting gross amount in posting currency. |
| `amountVat` | number |  | The amount of vat on this posting in company currency (NOK). |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `closeGroup` | string |  | Optional. Used to create a close group for postings. |
| `currency` | Currency |  |  |
| `customer` | Customer |  |  |
| `date` | string |  | The posting date. |
| `department` | Department |  |  |
| `description` | string |  | The description of the posting. |
| `employee` | Employee |  |  |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `invoiceNumber` | string |  | Invoice number. |
| `product` | Product |  |  |
| `project` | Project |  |  |
| `quantityAmount1` | number |  | The quantity amount associated with the posting |
| `quantityAmount2` | number |  | The quantity amount associated with the posting |
| `quantityType1` | ProductUnit |  |  |
| `quantityType2` | ProductUnit |  |  |
| `supplier` | Supplier |  |  |
| `termOfPayment` | string |  | Due date. |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `vatType` | VatType |  |  |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
| `voucher` | Voucher |  |  |

### `IncomingOrderLineOriginal`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `amountExclVat` | number |  | Total amount of the order line, excluding VAT, including discount, markup, allowances, and charges. (read-only) |
| `amountInclVat` | number |  | Total amount of the order line, including VAT, including discount, markup, allowances, and charges. (read-only) |
| `count` | number |  | Quantity/count of the order line. (read-only) |
| `description` | string |  | Description of the order line. (read-only) |
| `discount` | number |  | Discount and allowance combined, in percentage. (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  | Unique identifier for the order line. (read-only) |
| `incomingInvoiceOriginalId` | integer |  | Reference to the original invoice this order line belongs to. (read-only) |
| `markup` | number |  | Markup and charge combined, in percentage. (read-only) |
| `name` | string |  | Name of the order line. (read-only) |
| `orderLineType` | string enum: ['EXPENSE', 'ROUND_OFF', 'ALLOWANCE', 'CHARGE', 'MARKUP', 'DISCOUNT'] |  | Type of the order line (e.g., EXPENSE). (read-only) |
| `productName` | string |  | Product name. (read-only) |
| `row` | integer |  | Sequence number of the order line, starting at 1. Start with 1 to align with posting row numbers. (read-only) |
| `rowId` | string |  | Unique identifier for the order line within an EHF invoice. (read-only) |
| `sellersProductIdentification` | string |  | Seller's product identification code. (read-only) |
| `standardProductIdentificationId` | string |  | Standard product identification ID. (read-only) |
| `standardProductIdentificationSchemeId` | string |  | Standard product identification scheme ID. (read-only) |
| `unitPrice` | number |  | Unit price of the order line, excluding VAT, including discount, markup, allowances, and charges. (read-only) |
| `vatPercent` | number |  | Vat rate in percentage, e.g., 25.0 for 25%. (read-only) |
| `vatType` | string |  | Vat type code from the EHF standard, e.g., 'S', 'M', 'H', 'E'. (read-only) |

### `Invoice`

Invoicing plans tied to the project

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `amount` | number |  | In the company’s currency, typically NOK. (read-only) |
| `amountCurrency` | number |  | In the specified currency. (read-only) |
| `amountCurrencyOutstanding` | number |  | The amountCurrency outstanding based on the history collection, excluding reminders and any existing (read-only) |
| `amountCurrencyOutstandingTotal` | number |  | The amountCurrency outstanding based on the history collection and including the last reminder and a (read-only) |
| `amountExcludingVat` | number |  | Amount excluding VAT (NOK). (read-only) |
| `amountExcludingVatCurrency` | number |  | Amount excluding VAT in the specified currency. (read-only) |
| `amountOutstanding` | number |  | The amount outstanding based on the history collection, excluding reminders and any existing remits, (read-only) |
| `amountOutstandingTotal` | number |  | The amount outstanding based on the history collection and including the last reminder and any exist (read-only) |
| `amountRoundoff` | number |  | Amount of round off to nearest integer. (read-only) |
| `amountRoundoffCurrency` | number |  | Amount of round off to nearest integer in the specified currency. (read-only) |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `comment` | string |  | Comment text for the specific invoice. |
| `creditedInvoice` | integer |  | The id of the original invoice if this is a credit note. (read-only) |
| `currency` | Currency |  |  |
| `customer` | Customer |  |  |
| `deliveryDate` | string |  | The delivery date. (read-only) |
| `documentId` | integer |  |  (read-only) |
| `ehfSendStatus` | string enum: ['DO_NOT_SEND', 'SEND', 'SENT', 'SEND_FAILURE_RECIPIENT_NOT_FOUND'] |  | [Deprecated] EHF (Peppol) send status. This only shows status for historic EHFs. |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `invoiceComment` | string |  | Comment text for the invoice. This was specified on the order as invoiceComment. (read-only) |
| `invoiceDate` | string |  |  |
| `invoiceDueDate` | string |  |  |
| `invoiceNumber` | integer |  | If value is set to 0, the invoice number will be generated. |
| `invoiceRemark` | InvoiceRemark |  |  |
| `invoiceRemarks` | string |  | Deprecated Invoice remarks - please use the 'invoiceRemark' instead. |
| `isApproved` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isCharged` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isCreditNote` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isCredited` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isPeriodizationPossible` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `kid` | string |  | KID - Kundeidentifikasjonsnummer. |
| `orderLines` | Array<OrderLine> |  | Orderlines connected to the invoice. (read-only) |
| `orders` | Array<Order> |  | Related orders. Only one order per invoice is supported at the moment. |
| `paidAmount` | number |  | [BETA] Optional. Used to specify the prepaid amount of the invoice. The paid amount can be specified |
| `paymentTypeId` | integer |  | [BETA] Optional. Used to specify payment type for prepaid invoices. Payment type can be specified he |
| `postings` | Array<Posting> |  | The invoice postings, which includes a posting for the invoice with a positive amount, and one or mo (read-only) |
| `projectInvoiceDetails` | Array<ProjectInvoiceDetails> |  | ProjectInvoiceDetails contains additional information about the invoice, in particular invoices for  (read-only) |
| `reminders` | Array<Reminder> |  | Invoice debt collection and reminders. (read-only) |
| `sumRemits` | number |  | The sum of all open remittances of the invoice. Remittances are reimbursement payments back to the c (read-only) |
| `travelReports` | Array<TravelExpense> |  | Travel reports connected to the invoice. (read-only) |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
| `voucher` | Voucher |  |  |

| `isPrioritizeAmountsIncludingVat` | boolean |  |  |
| `isShowOpenPostsOnInvoices` | boolean |  | Show account statement - open posts on invoices created from this order |
| `isSubscription` | boolean |  | If true, the order is a subscription, which enables periodical invoicing of order lines. First, crea |
| `isSubscriptionAutoInvoicing` | boolean |  | Automatic invoicing. Starts when the subscription is approved |
| `markUpOrderLines` | number |  | Set mark-up (%) for order lines. |
| `number` | string |  |  |
| `orderDate` | string |  |  |

| `reference` | string |  |  |

| `expired` | boolean |  | Is this transaction expired. (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `isApproveDisabled` | boolean |  | Can this payment be approved. (read-only) |
| `isCancelDisabled` | boolean |  | Can this payment be cancelled. (read-only) |

| `isDisabledForAmountChange` | boolean |  | Can this payment amount be changed. (read-only) |
| `isDisabledForUpdate` | boolean |  | Can this payment date be changed. (read-only) |
| `isDueDateUpdatable` | boolean |  | Can this payment due date be changed. (read-only) |
| `isFinalStatus` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isForeignPayment` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isManuallyBookable` | boolean |  | Is this payment manually bookable. (read-only) |
| `isSalary` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isSalaryDateInvalid` | boolean |  | Is the due date invalid, if this is a salary payment. (read-only) |

| `kid` | string |  | KID - Kundeidentifikasjonsnummer. (read-only) |

| `numberOfApprovers` | integer |  | Number of approvers required for this transaction. Ztl only! (read-only) |
| `paymentCategory` | string enum: ['TRANSFER_BETWEEN_ACCOUNTS', 'REIMBURSEMENT', 'SUPPLIER_INVOICE', 'WITHHOLDING_TAX', 'TAX_DEDUCTION', 'VAT', 'SALARY', 'ENI', 'REGISTERED'] |  | The payment category. (read-only) |
| `paymentDate` | string |  |  |
| `paymentSource` | string enum: ['AutoPayTransaction', 'ZtlTransaction'] |  |  |
| `postings` | Posting |  |  |
| `receiverLink` | string |  | The payment receiver link or name. (read-only) |
| `receiverReference` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `sourceVoucher` | Voucher |  |  |
| `statusId` | string enum: ['NEW', 'PENDING_SIGNING', 'CANCELLED', 'ERROR', 'RECEIVED_BY_BANK', 'ACCEPTED_BY_BANK', 'PENDING_IN_BANK', 'PENDING_SIGNING_IN_BANK', 'CANCELLED_IN_BANK', 'REJECTED_BY_BANK', 'PAID', 'OTHER'] |  | The payment status Id. ### `ProjectInvoiceDetails`

ProjectInvoiceDetails contains additional information about the invoice, in particular invoices for projects. It contains information about the charged project, the fee amount, extra percent and amount, extra costs, travel expenses, invoice and project comments, akonto amount and values determining if extra costs, akonto and hours should be included. ProjectInvoiceDetails is an object which represents the relation between an invoice and a Project, Orderline and OrderOut object.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `amountOrderLinesAndReinvoicing` | number |  | The amount of chargeable manual order lines and vendor invoices on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `amountOrderLinesAndReinvoicingCurrency` | number |  | The amount of chargeable manual order lines and vendor invoices on the project invoice, in the invoi (read-only) |
| `amountTravelReportsAndExpenses` | number |  | The amount of travel costs and expenses on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `amountTravelReportsAndExpensesCurrency` | number |  | The amount of travel costs and expenses on the project invoice, in the invoice currency. (read-only) |
| `changes` | Array<Change> |  |  (read-only) |
| `feeAmount` | number |  | Fee amount of the project. For example: 100 NOK. (read-only) |
| `feeAmountCurrency` | number |  | Fee amount of the project in the invoice currency. (read-only) |
| `feeInvoiceText` | string |  | The fee comment on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `includeHours` | boolean |  | Determines if hours should be included on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `includeOnAccountBalance` | boolean |  | Determines if akonto should be included on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `includeOrderLinesAndReinvoicing` | boolean |  | Determines if extra costs should be included on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `invoice` | Invoice |  |  |
| `invoiceText` | string |  | The comment on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `markupAmount` | number |  | The amount value of mark-up of amountFee on the project invoice. For example: 10 NOK. (read-only) |
| `markupAmountCurrency` | number |  | The amount value of mark-up of amountFee on the project invoice, in the invoice currency. (read-only) |
| `markupPercent` | number |  | The percentage value of mark-up of amountFee. For example: 10%. (read-only) |
| `onAccountBalanceAmount` | number |  | The akonto amount on the project invoice. (read-only) |
| `onAccountBalanceAmountCurrency` | number |  | The akonto amount on the project invoice in the invoice currency. (read-only) |
| `project` | Project |  |  |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `vatType` | VatType |  |  |
| `version` | integer |  |  |

| Property | Type | Required | Description |

| `document` | Document |  |  |
| `endDate` | string |  | The end date of the reconciliation period |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `modifiable` | boolean |  | Indicates if the reconciliation is in a modifiable state (read-only) |
| `requiresControl` | boolean |  | Indicates if the reconciliation requires an additional control step after completion |
| `startDate` | string |  | The start date of the reconciliation period |
| `status` | string enum: ['DRAFT', 'COMPLETED', 'CONTROLLED', 'ERROR', 'WARNING'] |  | The status of the reconciliation (read-only) |
| `term` | integer |  | The term of the reconciliation |
| `type` | string enum: ['UNKNOWN', 'VAT_GENERAL_INDUSTRY', 'VAT_PRIMARY_INDUSTRY', 'SALARY', 'BALANCE', 'PAYROLL_TAX', 'TAX_DEDUCTION', 'MANDATORY_DEDUCTION', 'HOLIDAY_ALLOWANCE', 'FINANCE_TAX', 'ANNUAL_BALANCE'] |  | The type of reconciliation, e.g., 'VAT', 'Bank', etc. |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
| `year` | integer |  | The year of the reconciliation |
