| `reconciliationTypes` | Array<string> |  | The reconciliation types involved in this aggregation (read-only) |
| `reconciliations` | Array<Reconciliation> |  | Reconciliations included in this aggregation (read-only) |
| `requiresControl` | boolean |  | Any of the aggregated reconciliations that has been marked as requires control (read-only) |

### `SalaryReconciliationOverview`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `groups` | Array<SalaryReconciliationOverviewGroup> |  | The relevant VAT groups (read-only) |
| `period` | AOReconciliationPeriod |  |  |

### `SalaryReconciliationOverviewGroup`

The relevant VAT groups

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `displayName` | string |  | The human readable name of the group (read-only) |
| `lines` | Array<SalaryReconciliationOverviewGroupLine> |  | The lines of data in the group (read-only) |

### `SalaryReconciliationOverviewGroupLine`

The lines of data in the group

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `accountId` | integer |  | The ID of the relevant account (read-only) |
| `differences` | number |  | The difference between the current ledger data and the reported VAT data (read-only) |
| `displayName` | string |  | The human-readable name of the account (read-only) |
| `ledgerData` | number |  | The value calculated from the current ledger (read-only) |
| `reportedData` | number |  | The value that was reported to the tax authority (read-only) |
| `taxAuthorityData` | number |  | The value that the tax authority has on record for this account (read-only) |

### `SalaryReconciliationVacationPay`

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `earlySettledVacationPay` | number |  | The total amount of vacation pay that was paid in the same fiscal year as it was earned (read-only) |
| `extraVacationPay` | number |  | The total amount of extra vacation pay given to those over 60 years old (read-only) |
| `prevYearOwedVacationPay` | number |  | The total amount of owed vacation pay from the previous year (read-only) |
| `prevYearSettledVacationPay` | number |  | The total amount of owed vacation pay disbursed in the current year (read-only) |
| `vacationPayBasis` | number |  | The basis amount that the accrued vacation pay is derived from (read-only) |
| `vacationPayRateAmounts` | Array<RateAmount> |  | The list of vacation pay rates and their corresponding amounts (read-only) |

| Property | Type | Required | Description |

### `TripletexAccountCreator`

Information about the company creator/company that wants to establish access connection.

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `companyInvoiceEmail` | string |  | Email address for the accountant or auditor invoicing. (read-only) |
| `companyName` | string |  | Name of the creator company name. |
| `creatorCustomerId` | integer |  | Id of the creator's company card. (read-only) |
| `creatorEmployeeEmail` | string |  | Email of the new account creator. |
| `creatorEmployeeId` | integer |  | Id of the new account creator. (read-only) |
| `creatorRelationTypes` | Array<string> |  | The creator's tripletex company's type (accountant, auditor, both or others). |
| `isAccountantAndAuditor` | boolean |  | Flag for checking if the creator is both an accountant and auditor. |
| `isAccountantOrSimilar` | boolean |  | Flag for checking if the creator is either an accountant or an auditor. |
| `isLoginEmployeeProxy` | boolean |  | Flag for checking if the current logged in employee is a proxy. |
| `isSchoolReseller` | boolean |  | Flag for checking if the creator company is a school reseller. |
| `isTripletex` | boolean |  | Flag for checking if the creator is Tripletex. |

| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |

| `status` | string enum: ['WAITING', 'DONE', 'SKIPPED', 'ERROR', 'NONE', 'PROCESSING', 'RECLAIMED'] |  | Process status |
| `timestamp` | string |  | Time of last update (read-only) |
| `type` | string enum: ['TRIPLETEX', 'SUPPLIERINVOICE_EXTERNAL', 'DEBT_COLLECTION'] |  | The type of process (read-only) |
| `url` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `version` | integer |  |  |
| `voucher` | Voucher |  |  |

| `description` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `displayStatus` | string |  | The payment filter status. (read-only) |
| `endToEndId` | string |  |  (read-only) |
| `expired` | boolean |  | Is this transaction expired. (read-only) |
| `flowId` | string |  |  |
| `id` | integer |  |  |
| `isApproveDisabled` | boolean |  | Can this payment be approved. (read-only) |
| `isCancelDisabled` | boolean |  | Can this payment be cancelled. (read-only) |
| `isDeleteDisabled` | boolean |  | Can this payment be deleted (read-only) |
| `isDisabledForAmountChange` | boolean |  | Can this payment amount be changed. (read-only) |
| `isDisabledForUpdate` | boolean |  | Can this payment date be changed. (read-only) |
| `isDueDateUpdatable` | boolean |  | Can this payment due date be changed. (read-only) |
| `isFinalStatus` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isForeignPayment` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isManuallyBookable` | boolean |  | Is this payment manually bookable. (read-only) |
| `isSalary` | boolean |  |  (read-only) |
| `isSalaryDateInvalid` | boolean |  | Is the due date invalid, if this is a salary payment. (read-only) |
| `isSelectable` | boolean |  | Is this payment selectable. (read-only) |
| `kid` | string |  | KID - Kundeidentifikasjonsnummer. (read-only) |
| `mergingBanksMessage` | string |  | Message regarding merging of banks (read-only) |

Usually all the payments in one batch have the same status ID, at least to th |
